notes: Final validated build. Boots with RS485 multi-radar queue from address 02 upward, reports all radar distances and occupancy to OTA and radar platforms, OLED shows ID02 and occupied/total, 4G EC801E retrieves OTA manifest over PDP/QHTTP, and 8081 cloud commands execute on the ESP32 edge gateway.
description: Multi-radar edge gateway final: Wi-Fi telemetry, 4G OTA manifest transport, cloud-to-edge radar commands
